visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with black hair stands in a Costco warehouse aisle, wearing a black top with a distinctive chest cutout. She points excitedly at a stack of Aunt Stella's cookie boxes. The background is filled with industrial warehouse shelving and bulk food products under bright fluorescent lighting. (2) The woman picks up a large box of cookies, displaying the colorful floral and fruit illustrations on the front to the camera. She maintains a wide-eyed, enthusiastic facial expression and uses broad hand gestures while standing in the same warehouse setting. (3) The camera zooms in on a second product, Aunt Stella Corn Flake Cookie Balls, which has yellow and pink packaging. The woman points to the price tag on the shelf above the products while smiling directly at the lens. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor living room with warm lighting. Two women sit at a grey counter with the cookie box. One wears a black headband, and the other wears a zebra-patterned bucket hat and an orange top. They open the box with exaggerated excitement. (5) They pull out individually wrapped cookie packets, holding them up for close-up shots. The women break a dark-colored cookie in half, revealing the internal texture and pieces of dried fruit. They both take bites and react with intense positive expressions. (6) The women continue to hold different types of cookies and the box, gesturing toward the product and their own faces to show satisfaction. The background shows domestic furniture and a shelf with several plush animal toys.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 比百貨公司便宜超多. [Slogan]: 必買水果餅乾組. [Subtitle]: 你笑那麼開心~做什麼. (2) [Slogan]: 好事成雙!!. [Subtitle]: 因為我手上有些茶的. (3) [Subtitle]: 詩特莉經典水果餅乾組. (4) [Subtitle]: 我們有茶 接下來要水果. (5) [Subtitle]: 聽我一直報 然後我一直買不到 我很生氣. (6) [Subtitle]: 好啦 水果的也買 然後它後面還有玉米的. (7) [Subtitle]: 他的玉米酥球是247元 很大一個 但就是單一口味. (8) [Variety]: 太有面子了. [Subtitle]: 家裡放一組 詩特莉餅乾 真的是太有面子了. (9) [Subtitle]: 首先她的盒子好漂亮. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後打開以後 裡面有15包餅乾. (11) [Subtitle]: 每一包都有兩片. 那他裡面總共有三種口味. (12) [Subtitle]: 藍莓、蘋果以及覆盆莓酸櫻桃. (13) [Variety]: 超多料. [Subtitle]: 我們可以看到她的藍莓 超多料. (14) [Subtitle]: 啦啦~好多藍莓乾在裡面 以及你吃下去. (15) [Variety]: 藍莓濃郁. [Subtitle]: 她怎麼可以做的比藍莓馬芬 還要更藍莓濃郁呢. (16) [Subtitle]: 蘋果呢 上面還有蘋果果乾 裡面是完熟的蘋果. (17) [Subtitle]: 所以酸甜的味道 真的是太完美. (18) [Subtitle]: 酸度最高的 覆盆莓酸櫻桃. (19) [Subtitle]: 這個好好吃喔 好喜歡喔. (20) [Subtitle]: 你吃了以後就是 嗯~. (21) [Subtitle]: 嘴巴的口水就是會 流不停的那一種. (22) [Slogan]: 好市多買最划算. [Subtitle]: 詩特莉餅乾 真的是 好市多買最划算.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two primary female creators appearing in both warehouse and home settings.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has black hair with a black cutout top; the second has long dark hair and wears a zebra-print bucket hat with an orange top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Transitions from a large Costco warehouse with tall steel racks and bulk boxes to a home kitchen/living room with a grey counter and plush toys on a shelf.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo electronic background music with a synthesized beat begins instantly. A high-pitched female voice speaks with high arousal and rapid speed. A comical 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as she gestures. (2) A 'ding' bell sound effect highlights a brand name. The speaker's voice maintains a bright, professional clarity with frequent rising intonations. (3) A second female voice joins in, creating a high-energy dialogue. There is a short cartoon-style pop effect. The voices sound projected as if using a professional lavalier microphone. (4) Audible plastic rustling is heard as packaging is handled, followed by a soft impact sound as the box is placed on the table. The music keeps a consistent, happy major-mode vibe. (5) Exaggerated chewing sounds are followed by a loud, satisfied 'Mmm!' vocalization. The audio concludes with a final energetic slogan and a musical stinger.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Intro -> Unboxing -> Tasting Review -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional product review intended to inform Costco shoppers about a specific Aunt Stella cookie gift set. It highlights the value proposition compared to department stores and uses high-energy tasting segments to validate the product's quality and appeal.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, pricing information, and repeated positive verbal endorsements within a lifestyle context.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly dynamic, social-media-native edit with consistent text overlays and sound effects designed to maintain high viewer engagement.
